title: Start QA automatically when builds complete
brief: Ready for QA should not be a manual waiting board. When a validated build completes, automatically start the configured QA agent and show QA as running. Keep failed QA as an explicit retry state to avoid loops.
description: Remove the routine manual QA handoff. The ready-for-qa state remains available as a short-lived durable transition in task data, but the extension observes it and automatically claims and launches QA. The UI should communicate automatic QA rather than presenting a normal Start QA gate.
acceptanceCriteria: A task entering ready-for-qa with a configured QA agent automatically transitions to qa-running and launches that agent.
Automatic QA startup is guarded against duplicate watcher events and duplicate terminals.
A failed-qa task does not automatically retry in a loop and retains a manual retry action.
The task UI no longer presents Ready for QA as a routine manual destination.
If automatic QA cannot start, the task remains recoverable and the user receives a useful error.
qaChecklist: Complete a validated build and verify QA starts without clicking Start QA.
Trigger repeated file watcher refreshes and verify only one QA terminal starts.
Verify failed QA offers an explicit retry and does not auto-loop.
Verify missing/unavailable QA agent produces a useful notification without corrupting task state.
designQaChecklist: QA Running reads as active system work rather than another manual queue.
Failed QA clearly communicates that human-triggered retry is intentional.
constraints: Keep ready-for-qa as a durable internal state for script compatibility.
Do not include unrelated uncommitted changes from the main checkout.
agentNotes: Created from the user's request to remove the manual Ready for QA queue. TASK-005 was separately revalidated and passed to human-review before starting this work. Implemented startup and file-watcher scans for ready-for-qa tasks. A per-task in-flight set and last-attempted task version prevent duplicate launches and notification loops. Only ready-for-qa auto-starts; failed-qa retains an explicit Retry QA action. The UI replaces routine Ready/Start QA actions with automatic handoff messaging.

qaNotes.message: Verified automatic ready-for-qa scanning, duplicate guards, startup recovery, non-looping failed QA, and updated handoff/retry UI. All validation commands pass.

activityLog.message: Created task for automatic QA startup; recorded ready-for-qa as an internal compatibility transition.

Implemented guarded automatic QA launch on extension startup and board changes, plus automatic-handoff and explicit-retry UI states. Local typecheck, build, and tests passed.
Started QA. Reusing existing worktree at /Users/bimpe/Documents/Experiments/agent board/.agent-board/worktrees/TASK-006 on branch agent-board/TASK-006-start-qa-automatically-when-builds-complete.
QA passed. Moved task to human-review.
